name: Oceanschedules Module Design Review & Documentation
description: Comprehensive review of the oceanschedules module: design, architecture, components, data flows, dependencies, test strategy, configuration, and critical assessment. Output: DESIGN-PRE-AWS-upgrade.md

entries.summary: Completed comprehensive design review and documentation of oceanschedules + oceanschedules-process modules. Created DESIGN-PRE-AWS-upgrade.md with 15 sections covering architecture, components, data flows, dependencies, test strategy, and critical review.
entries.detail: Document created at oceanschedules/docs/DESIGN-PRE-AWS-upgrade.md. Key findings: 132 production Java files, 59 test classes in API module. 9 sub-modules in process pipeline (collector, inbound, staging, aggregator, loader, outbound, port-pair-generator, common, maps). All using AWS SDK v1. Critical issues: Jest client (deprecated), mixed ES versions, always-true retry condition, no cloud-sdk abstraction, no DynamoDB integration tests, overly large CarrierService class.
